author: Augustine of Hippo
book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
On the same words of the Gospel, John i., ‘In the beginning was the word,’ etc.

ccel.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

title: On the same words of the Gospel, John i., ‘In the beginning was the word,’ etc.

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: All ye who are looking for a man’s many words, understand the One Word of God, “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Now, “In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But, “The Word was,” since we have heard, “In the beginning God made.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Acknowledge we in Him the Creator; for Creator is He who made; and the creature what He made.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For no creature which was made “was,” as God the Word “was,” by whom it was made, always.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Now when we heard “The Word was,” with whom was It?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: We understand the Father who did not make nor create the Same Word, but begat Him.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For, “In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Whereby made He them?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “The Word was, and the Word was with God;” but what kind of Word?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Did it sound and so pass away?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Was it a mere thought, and motion of the mind?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: No. Was it suggested by memory, and uttered?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: No. What kind of Word then?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Why dost thou look for many words from me?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “The Word was God.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: When we hear, “The Word was God,” we do not make a second God; but we understand the Son.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For the Word is the Son of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lo, the Son, and What but God?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For “The Word was God.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What the Father?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: God of course.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If the Father is God and the Son God, do we make two Gods?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The Father is God, the Son God; but the Father and the Son One God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For the Only Son of God was not made, but born.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “In the beginning God made the heaven and the earth;” but the Word was of the Father.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Was the Word therefore made by the Father?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: No. “All things were made by Him.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If by Him all things were made, was He too made by Himself?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Do not imagine that He by whom thou hearest all things were made was Himself made among all things.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For if He were made Himself, all things were not made by Him, but Himself was made among the rest.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: You say, “He was made;” what, by Himself?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Who can make himself?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If then He was made, how by Him were all things made?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: See, Himself too was made, as you say, not I, for that He was begotten, I do not deny.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If then you say that He was made, I ask by what, by whom?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Then He “was,” before He was made, that He might make Himself.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But if all things were made by Him, understand that He was not Himself made.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If thou art not able to understand, believe, that thou mayest understand.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Faith goes before; understanding follows after; since the Prophet says, “Unless ye believe, ye shall not understand.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The Word was.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Look not for time in Him, by whom times were made.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “The Word was.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But you say, “There was a time that the Word was not.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: You say falsely; nowhere do you read this.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But I do read for you, “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What look you for before the beginning?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But if you should be able to find anything before the beginning, this will be the beginning.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He is mad who looks for anything before the beginning.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What then doth he say was before the beginning?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But you will say, “The Father both ‘was,’ and was before the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What are you looking for?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What you find, understand; seek not for what you are not able to find.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Nothing is before the beginning.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “In the beginning was the Word.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The Son is the Brightness of the Father.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of the Wisdom of the Father, which is the Son, it is said, “For He is the brightness of the Everlasting Light.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Are you seeking for a Son without a Father?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Give me a light without brightness.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If there was a time when the Son was not, the Father was a light obscure.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For how was He not an obscure Light, if It had no brightness?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: So then the Father always, the Son always.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If the Father always, the Son always.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Do you ask of me, whether the Son were born?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I answer, “born.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For He would not be a Son if not born.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: So when I say, the Son always was, I say in fact was always born.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And who understands, “Was always born”?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Give me an eternal fire, and I will give thee an eternal brightness.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: We bless God who hath given to us the holy Scriptures.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Be ye not blind in the brightness of the light.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Brightness is engendered of the Light, and yet the Brightness is Coeternal with the Light that engenders It.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The Light always, its Brightness always.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It begat Its Own Brightness; but was it ever without Its Brightness?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Let God be allowed to beget an eternal Son.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: I pray you hear of whom we are speaking; hear, mark, believe, understand.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of God are we speaking.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: We confess and believe the Son coeternal with the Father.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But you will say, “When a man begets a Son, he that begets is the elder, and he that is begotten the younger.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It is true; in the case of men, he that begets is the elder, and he that is begotten, the younger, and he arrives in time to his father’s strength.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But why, save that whilst the one grows, the other grows old?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Let the father stand still a while, and in his growing the son will follow on him, and you will see him equal.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But see, I give you whereby to understand this.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Fire engenders a coeval brightness.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Among men you only find sons younger, fathers older; you do not find them coeval: but as I have said, I show you brightness coeval with its parent fire.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For fire begets brightness, yet is it never without brightness.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Since then you see that the brightness is coeval with its fire, suffer God to beget a Coeternal Son.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Whoso understandeth, let him rejoice: but whoso understandeth not, let him believe.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For the word of the Prophet cannot be disannulled; “Unless ye believe, ye shall not understand.”
